title: Who needs what in World Cup qualifying?
summary: England can secure World Cup qualification with a draw or win against Spain this week, while other nations compete for remaining spots in Brazil. The article examines the mathematical scenarios for qualification across different teams.
content: England will seal a place at next summer's World Cup if they avoid defeat against Spain on Friday, but who else can secure a spot in Brazil?

zh.title: 世界杯预选赛中谁需要什么?
zh.summary: 英格兰可以通过本周与西班牙的平局或胜利来确保世界杯资格，而其他国家争夺巴西的剩余席位。这篇文章分析了不同球队的资格数学情景。

title: What's at stake for NI in their World Cup qualifiers?
summary: Northern Ireland faces critical matches in their World Cup qualifying campaign with multiple outcomes determining their tournament fate. The article analyzes the scenarios that could unfold in the final round of qualifiers.
content: BBC Sport NI looks at the possible outcomes heading into the final round of fixtures.

zh.title: 北爱尔兰世界杯预选赛中面临的风险是什么?
zh.summary: 北爱尔兰在世界杯预选赛中面临关键比赛，多个结果决定了他们的锦标赛命运。这篇文章分析了预选赛最后一轮可能出现的情景。

title: World Cup quiz: Do you remember these mascots?
summary: The 2026 World Cup will feature an eagle, moose, and jaguar as official mascots. This quiz tests fans' knowledge of historical World Cup mascot characters and offers nostalgia about tournament iconography.
content: An eagle, a moose and a jaguar are mascots at the FIFA 2026 World Cup - how well do you remember previous World Cup mascots?

zh.title: 世界杯测验：你还记得这些吉祥物吗?
zh.summary: 2026年世界杯将以鹰、麋鹿和美洲虎作为官方吉祥物。这个测验考察球迷对历史世界杯吉祥物角色的了解，唤起对锦标赛标志的怀旧之情。

title: Celtic & Rangers set sights on midfielder - gossip
summary: Scottish clubs Rangers and Celtic are competing to sign the same Danish midfielder in the transfer window. Stephen Welsh is also preparing to leave Celtic in a major defensive reshuffle.
content: Rangers and Celtic are both interested in the same Danish midfielder, as Stephen Welsh heads for Parkhead exit in Wednesday's Scottish gossip column.

zh.title: 凯尔特人和流浪者看中中场球员 - 传闻
zh.summary: 苏格兰俱乐部流浪者队和凯尔特人队在转会窗口期竞争签约同一名丹麦中场球员。同时，斯蒂芬·韦尔什也准备离开凯尔特人队，进行重大防线调整。

title: Aston Villa top scorer Hanson set to join Spurs
summary: Kirsty Hanson, Aston Villa's leading scorer in the Women's Super League, is transferring to Tottenham after a strong campaign. The move strengthens Spurs' attacking depth for the upcoming season.
content: Aston Villa forward Kirsty Hanson is set to join Tottenham following an impressive season in the Women's Super League.

zh.title: 阿斯顿维拉射手汉森将加入热刺
zh.summary: 阿斯顿维拉在女超联赛的最佳射手柯丝蒂·汉森在一个出色的赛季后转会至托特纳姆。这一举措增强了热刺下赛季的进攻深度。

title: Mohamed Salah - Egyptian king
summary: Mohamed Salah has become a national icon in Egypt, transcending football to represent inspiration and achievement across the nation. BBC Sport explores how the Liverpool star's journey from humble origins to world-class status resonates with Egyptians.
content: BBC Sport visits Egypt to discover what Mohamed Salah means to the people of the football-mad country, and how a small boy from humble beginnings became a national icon.

zh.title: 穆罕默德·萨拉赫 - 埃及国王
zh.summary: 穆罕默德·萨拉赫已成为埃及的民族偶像，超越足球范畴，代表着整个民族的灵感和成就。英国广播公司体育频道探索了这位利物浦之星从卑微出身到世界顶级球星的历程如何引起埃及人的共鸣。

title: The anatomy of a Golden Boot winner - and who could win it in 2026?
summary: The article examines the characteristics and patterns of past World Cup top scorers to identify contenders for the 2026 Golden Boot award. Leading candidates are analyzed based on their performance metrics and tournament history.
content: A look at the common attributes of World Cup Golden Boot winners and the claims of the leading 2026 candidates examined.

zh.title: 金靴奖得主的解析——谁将在2026年赢得金靴奖？
zh.summary: 文章分析了历届世界杯顶级射手的特征和规律，以确定2026年金靴奖的争夺者。根据性能指标和锦标赛历史对主要候选人进行评估。

title: Rivals: Messi v Ronaldo - watch the trailer
summary: A new production explores the legendary rivalry between Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo that shaped modern football. The documentary examines how their competition elevated the sport and inspired millions of fans worldwide.
content: The story of how Lionel Messi v Cristiano Ronaldo became the rivalry that transformed football and defined a generation.

zh.title: 对手：梅西与罗纳尔多——观看预告片
zh.summary: 一部新作品探讨了莱昂内尔·梅西和克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多之间塑造现代足球的传奇对抗。纪录片审视了他们的竞争如何提升了这项运动，并激励了全球数百万球迷。

title: Inside Arsenal's mammoth 63-game season: Premier L...
summary: Arsenal's Premier League title triumph reflects years of strategic planning, with ESPN revealing the club's approach to returning to the top. The 63-game season underscores the team's competitive ambitions and long-term vision.
content: Arsenal's Premier League title triumph has been years in the making. For the first time, ESPN can reveal the strategy which took them back to the top.

zh.title: 深入阿森纳庞大的63场赛季：英超策略
zh.summary: 阿森纳的英超联赛冠军胜利反映了多年的战略规划，ESPN揭示了该俱乐部重返顶级的方法。63场赛季强调了球队的竞争野心和长期愿景。
